mapper.select: SELECT NVL(COUNT(*), 0) FROM report r JOIN member m ON r.member_id = m.member_id

SELECT r.report_no AS reportNo, r.reason, r.status, TO_CHAR(r.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS createdAt, TO_CHAR(r.updated_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS updatedAt, r.member_id AS memberId, m.login_id AS reporterName, r.target_type AS targetType, r.target_no AS targetNo, r.admin_id AS adminId, a.name AS adminName FROM report r JOIN member m ON r.member_id = m.member_id LEFT JOIN admin_detail a ON r.admin_id = a.member_id
ORDER BY r.report_no DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH FIRST #{size} ROWS ONLY

SELECT r.report_no AS reportNo, r.reason, r.status, r.admin_memo AS adminMemo, TO_CHAR(r.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS createdAt, TO_CHAR(r.updated_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS updatedAt, r.member_id AS memberId, m.login_id AS reporterName, r.target_type AS targetType, r.target_no AS targetNo, r.admin_id AS adminId, a.name AS adminName FROM report r JOIN member m ON r.member_id = m.member_id LEFT JOIN admin_detail a ON r.admin_id = a.member_id WHERE r.report_no = #{reportNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE report SET status = #{status}, admin_id = #{adminId}, admin_memo = #{adminMemo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, updated_at = SYSDATE WHERE report_no = #{reportNo}
mapper.select: SELECT b.banner_no AS bannerNo, b.type, b.title, b.link_url AS linkUrl, b.save_filename AS saveFilename, b.original_filename AS originalFilename, b.is_active AS isActive, TO_CHAR(b.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS createdAt, TO_CHAR(b.updated_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS updatedAt, b.admin_id AS adminId, a.name AS adminName FROM banner b LEFT JOIN admin_detail a ON b.admin_id = a.member_id WHERE b.type = #{type}

SELECT s.component_key AS componentKey, s.component_value AS componentValue, s.description, s.admin_id AS adminId, a.name AS adminName, TO_CHAR(s.updated_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS updatedAt FROM site_component s LEFT JOIN admin_detail a ON s.admin_id = a.member_id ORDER BY s.component_key ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE site_component SET component_value = #{componentValue}, admin_id = #{adminId}, updated_at = SYSDATE WHERE component_key = #{componentKey}
